playlists.descriptionBs: Uvod u arapsko pismo, osnove vokabulara i gramatike. Knjiga 1 i Knjiga 1b.
playlists.descriptionEn: Introduction to Arabic script, basic vocabulary and grammar. Book 1 and Book 1b.

playlists.descriptionBs: Napredna gramatika, glagolski oblici i prošireni vokabular.
playlists.descriptionEn: Advanced grammar, verb forms and expanded vocabulary.

playlists.descriptionBs: Složeni tekstovi, stilistika i visoki arapski.
playlists.descriptionEn: Complex texts, stylistics and elevated Arabic.
